Algeria • Tuareg desert camp dining

Terres Touareg Camp Dining

For Tassili, dining is part of the guided expedition. A camp cook and simple meals are more realistic than a restaurant listing in the rock-art zones.

★ 4.4 68 reviews
Image slot Restaurant Terres Touareg Camp Dining

About this restaurant

For Tassili, dining is part of the guided expedition. A camp cook and simple meals are more realistic than a restaurant listing in the rock-art zones.

Signature dish

Camp meals, tea, couscous, and simple desert expedition food

Practical information

Verify food, water, permits, guide support, and emergency planning with the operator before departure.

Nearby attraction

This restaurant is recommended for travelers visiting Djanet & Tassili n’Ajjer.
